Frequently Asked Questions About Wedding Alcohol in Austin

Q1: How far in advance should I plan my wedding alcohol delivery in Austin?
A: Book Party On Delivery at least 2-4 weeks in advance, especially during peak season in Austin, to ensure availability.

Q2: Can Party On Delivery accommodate specific beverage requests for my wedding?
A: Yes! Contact us with specific requests; we\'ll do our best to source them.

Q3: What safety measures are in place for Premier Party Cruises on Lake Travis?
A: Premier Party Cruises has a perfect safety record over 14+ years and 125,000 customers. Vessels are inspected, and crew are certified. Learn more about our safety.

Q4: Do you offer packages that combine boat cruises and alcohol delivery?
A: Yes! We can arrange combined packages for bachelor/bachelorette parties on Lake Travis. Explore Premier Party Cruises packages and contact Party On Delivery for beverages.

Q5: How does Party On Delivery handle last-minute changes for wedding orders?
A: Contact us as soon as possible with changes; we\'ll do our best to accommodate.
